title: SSA Combined Disability Processing Time, Monthly, FY2016–FY2026
description: National average combined disability processing (elapsed) time in days, reported monthly, from FY2016 through the latest available month of FY2026. Each fiscal year is followed by a fiscal-year average row.

columns.name: Fiscal Year
columns.description: Fiscal year label formatted 'FY - YYYY'. Subtotal rows use 'FY - YYYY Total Average'.

columns.name: Month
columns.description: Three-letter calendar month (Oct–Sep ordering). BLANK on the fiscal-year average subtotal rows.

columns.name: Average Processing (elapsed) Time (in Days)
columns.description: Average elapsed processing time for combined disability claims that month (or the FY average on subtotal rows).

source.title: Combined Disability Processing Time (FY2016 onwards), Monthly

notes: Rows where Month is blank and Fiscal Year ends in 'Total Average' are per-FY summary rows — exclude them when computing monthly statistics to avoid double counting. The trailing fiscal year (FY2026) is incomplete.
